channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Stones scores injury-time winner as Man City beats struggling Wolves 2-1 in Premier League
item.description: WOLVERHAMPTON, England (AP) — John Stones came up with an injury-time goal again as Manchester City narrowly avoided a major setback by beating last-place Wolves 2-1 in the Premier League on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Juan Soto's 3-run homer in 10th sends Yankees past Guardians 5-2 and into World Series for 41st time
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Juan Soto was supposed to be the difference-maker, the one who pushed the New York Yankees back to the top. They're one step away.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Haason Reddick is ending his contract holdout and plans to report to the Jets on Monday
item.description: Haason Reddick is ending his long holdout with the New York Jets and will report to the team on Monday. Agent Drew Rosenhaus told The Associated Press on Sunday that Reddick agreed to an adjusted contract for this season and the sides will continue to work toward a long-term deal beyond this year.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No. 5 Georgia knocks off No. 1 Texas 30-15, with Etienne running for 3 TDs
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Trevor Etienne ran for three touchdowns, the first two set up by cornerback Daylen Everette's takeaways, and fifth-ranked Georgia went on to beat Quinn Ewers and No. 1 Texas 30-15 on Saturday night. Etienne's last score was a 1-yard plunge on fourth down with 12:04 left.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah HC defeats Boston in overtime, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is showing a penchant for overtime in its first NHL season. Michael Kesserling scored at 2:46 of overtime to give the Utah Hockey Club a 2-1 victory over the Boston Bruins on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Texas TD against Georgia 2 plays after interception 1st wiped out by penalty and trash on field
item.description: Texas fans littered the north end of the field with water bottles and other trash after an interception for the top-ranked Longhorns against No. 5 Georgia was initially wiped out by a pass-interference penalty before officials changed the call.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: East Bay HS football powerhouse to vacate wins after investigation reveals team played ineligible athletes
item.description: El Cerrito forfeits victories over Campolindo, Amador Valley and others, coach Jacob Rincon has been on administrative leave since mid-September
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Tennessee upsets Alabama in SEC thriller; second loss of season puts Crimson Tide's playoff hopes in jeopardy
item.description: The Tennessee Volunteers and head coach Josh Heupel earned what many would consider a statement win on Saturday when they upset Alabama.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CMU inducts BJ Russell into the Hall of Honor
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado Mesa University recently honored two former athletes, linebacker BJ Russell and volleyball setter Jordyn Moody, for their outstanding contributions to CMU athletics.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Cam Ward throws for 4 touchdowns, No. 6 Miami survives Louisville comeback bids for wild 52-45 win
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky. (AP) — Cam Ward's offensive line gave him plenty of time to throw on some big plays. On others, he created the extra time he needed to find his target on his own. The combination kept No. 6 Miami ahead and eventually created opportunities for teammates to win a shootout to remember.
item.dc:creator: GARY B. GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-NFL star Eddie Lacy's blood alcohol level allegedly four times over legal limit during arrest: report
item.description: Police in Arizona reportedly made a traffic stop Sept. 30 that resulted in multiple DUI charges against Eddie Lacy after a 911 caller attempted "to locate a possible impaired driver.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WNBA Finals reach decisive Game 5 for first time since 2019 as Liberty and Lynx head to New York
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — It's fitting that a record-breaking season for the WNBA would come down to a winner-take-all Game 5 of its Finals. For the first time since 2019, the league championship will go the distance. This one will be in New York on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees squander lead, bounce back to take 3-1 advantage over Cleveland in ALCS
item.description: Emmanuel Clase continued his postseason struggles, as the New York Yankees rallied in the ninth - they are now one win away from making the World Series.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 2 Oregon routs Purdue 35-0, remains on top of Big Ten with first road shutout in over 30 years
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. (AP) — Oregon coach Dan Lanning challenged his team to see how it would respond to a long road trip on a short week following its 32-31 victory over then-No. 2 Ohio State last week. The No. 2 Ducks aced that test Friday night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lynx force Game 5 of WNBA Finals on Carleton's free throws to beat Liberty 82-80
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Bridget Carleton made two free throws with 2 seconds left, and the Minnesota Lynx forced a decisive Game 5 of the WNBA Finals, beating the New York Liberty 82-80 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Taylor Pendrith avoids biggest wind and stays in front in Las Vegas with a long day ahead
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Taylor Pendrith was spared wind so strong it caused a four-hour delay and battered the field Friday in the Shriners Hospital Open. The Canadian only had to play six holes and stayed in the lead before the second round was halted by darkness.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tony Bennett cites NIL and transfer portal era as reason he's suddenly retiring at Virginia
item.description: CHARLOTTESVILLE, Va. (AP) — Describing himself as “a square peg in a round hole,” a tearful Tony Bennett said Friday he suddenly retired from coaching at Virginia because he wasn’t suited to navigate the current landscape of college basketball.
item.dc:creator: MIKE BARBER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers rookie Ricky Pearsall will make his debut 50 days after being shot in the chest
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall will be activated and make his NFL debut Sunday against Kansas City 50 days after he was shot in the chest.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: First on PIX: NY Liberty's playoff run generates $18 million for NYC
item.description: BROOKLYN, N.Y. (PIX11) -- The New York Liberty's WNBA playoff run, including the ongoing championship series, has generated $18.3 million in economic impact for New York City.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: Broncos dominate Saints in Payton's return to New Orleans
item.description: For all four quarters. For all 60 minutes. The Denver Broncos were in complete control of the Saints.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: San Diego Wave FC gets new ownership after historic sale finalized
item.description: Seven months after it was first reported San Diego Wave FC would be getting new ownership, the National Women's Soccer League club announced on Thursday it was officially sold.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Denver Broncos at New Orleans Saints: TV channel, time, what to know
item.description: The Denver Broncos face the New Orleans Saints on the road for Thursday Night Football; an anticipated match against coach Sean Payton's former team.
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Donnell, ABC 4

item.title: Bills acquire wide receiver Amari Cooper from Browns, giving QB Josh Allen a much-needed playmaker
item.description: Amari Cooper went from a fading No. 1 wide receiver in Cleveland to a top one with Buffalo. Looking to add a playmaker for quarterback Josh Allen, the Bills acquired Cooper on Tuesday in a trade with the skidding Browns, whose season seems to be unraveling by the week with the NFL’s worst offense.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW and TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium in 2028
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta in 2028 at the home of the Falcons, following a vote of approval by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: You can design L.A.’s official World Cup 2026 poster: Here’s how
item.description: Calling all Los Angeles County residents (over the age of 18) with artistic skills! The Los Angeles World Cup 2026 Host Committee announced Tuesday that they are searching for local artists and designers to be part of a “once-in-a-generation opportunity” to create the official regional poster for t
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Stingrays at Tropicana Field relocated to The Florida Aquarium after hurricane damage
item.description: The stingrays at Tropicana Field have moved to a new home after the stadium sustained significant damage from Hurricane Milton last week.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Former LSU pole vaulter Mondo Duplantis proposes to girlfriend during Vogue photo shoot
item.description: Duplantis got down on one knee and proposed to Desiré Inglander while taking photos in The Hamptons. According to Vogue Scandinavia, the couple has been together for four years.
item.dc:creator: Trinity Velazquez, NewsNation
